---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like Matcha to do?

## Alternatives Considered

What have you tried, or what other approaches did you consider?

## Why This Matters

Who benefits, and in what scenario?

## Additional Context

Mockups, screenshots, or related tools/issues are welcome.
